goal: Execute mode refuses to start agent work when local AI readiness is not sane unless the operator explicitly overrides the gate.
narrative: A scheduled nightly starts on Bushido while the local AI runtime is degraded.
expected_outcome: Without an override, the wrapper exits before Dream or evolve starts. With --no-require-ai-sane, the wrapper records the degraded readiness state and only runs explicitly requested phases.

acceptance_vectors.check: bats tests/scripts/nightly-evolution.bats --filter 'execute blocks when ai-sane is not ok'
bats tests/scripts/nightly-evolution.bats --filter 'execute can override ai-sane gate explicitly'
